layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: REST controllers and request/response transfer objects exposing HTTP endpoints.

layers.name: Service & Security Layer
layers.description: Transactional business logic, authentication filters, exception handler, and application bootstrap.

layers.name: Data Access & Persistence
layers.description: JPA entities, Spring Data repositories, MapStruct object mapping, and migration datasets.

layers.name: Infrastructure & DevOps
layers.description: CI/CD pipeline files, containerization Dockerfiles, and orchestration tools.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Application setup configs, build settings, Maven pom, and environment variables.

layers.name: Testing
layers.description: Unit, integration, and security mock test suites validating the API logic.

tour.title: Spring Boot Bootstrap & Entry Point
tour.description: ClinicBookingApplication is the main class that bootstraps the Spring application container and runs components initialization.

tour.title: Security Configuration & Filters
tour.description: SecurityConfig sets up security filters, authentication providers, CORS policy, and password encryption. JWT token parsing is handled in JwtAuthenticationFilter.

tour.title: Database Entity Definitions
tour.description: Core domain entities like Clinic, Doctor, Patient, Slot, and Appointment define the data schema using JPA annotations.

tour.title: REST API Controller endpoints
tour.description: Controllers process HTTP requests, validate request bodies, and delegate business workflows to services.

tour.title: Service Implementation & Logic
tour.description: Service classes handle transactions, booking windows validation, doctor availability checks, and slot capacity allocations.
